testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE test centers or online proctored (OnVUE)

id_requirements: One valid government-issued photo ID with name and signature. Name must match HRCI registration and NDA form exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. On-screen calculator provided. Scratch paper provided at test center. No personal items in testing area.
renewal_options: Earn recertification credits (CEUs) every 3 years: PHR/SPHR/GPHR require 60 credits; aPHR requires 45 credits. Credits earned through continuing education, professional development, and HR activities.

prerequisites.description: 1 year experience in HR + bachelor's degree, OR 2 years HR experience + associate's degree, OR 4 years HR experience with high school diploma

retake_policy.notes: 90-day waiting period after first failed attempt. 180-day waiting period after second failed attempt. Maximum 3 attempts per exam cycle. Full fee required for each retake.

official_study_resources.title: HRCI Exam Prep Resources
official_study_resources.notes: Official study guides, practice questions, and learning bundles
